raw: {"perspective": "Communications Strategist", "vote": "amended-yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "Remove all user-facing strings and add a notice that the package is for internal use only", "rationale": "Publishing too early may risk reputation and security, but waiting may cost momentum. Amended publication balances these concerns by sharing the package while limiting exposure of user-facing text.", "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Publishing without removal of user-facing strings may lead to unintended external use and reputation damage. Waiting too long may lead to missed market opportunities and reduced feedback.", "constitutional_violations_detected": "No direct violations, but publishing user-facing strings without thorough audit may inadvertently breach Foundation Law 3 (Shame-free language) or other laws.", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
amendment_if_yes_amended: Remove all user-facing strings and add a notice that the package is for internal use only
rationale: Publishing too early may risk reputation and security, but waiting may cost momentum. Amended publication balances these concerns by sharing the package while limiting exposure of user-facing text.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Publishing without removal of user-facing strings may lead to unintended external use and reputation damage. Waiting too long may lead to missed market opportunities and reduced feedback.
constitutional_violations_detected: No direct violations, but publishing user-facing strings without thorough audit may inadvertently breach Foundation Law 3 (Shame-free language) or other laws.
